sections.heading: Management of Ampullary Adenoma
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "ampullary_adenoma", "title": "Management of Ampullary Adenoma", "branching_basis": ["Endoscopic resectability", "Presence of high-grade dysplasia", "Margins after resection"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Benign ampullary adenoma confirmed, without suspicion of adenocarcinoma", "options": [{"type": "Endoscopic removal", "label": "Preferred if technically feasible at high-volume center", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Endoscopic ampullectomy is recommended for adenomas without suspicion of adenocarcinoma, including those with high-grade dysplasia [AMP-2, MS-5].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Surgical ampullectomy", "label": "If endoscopic removal not possible", "preference": "Other recommended", "recommendation": "Can be chosen at surgical centers with expertise [AMP-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Pancreatoduodenectomy", "label": "If endoscopic removal not possible or for deeper invasion", "preference": "Other recommended", "recommendation": "Pancreatoduodenectomy is indicated if endoscopic removal is not possible or if there is suspicion of adenocarcinoma [AMP-2, MS-5].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Not applicable for benign adenomas."}}, {"criteria": "Positive margins after endoscopic removal", "options": [{"type": "Re-excision", "label": "Endoscopic or surgical", "preference": "Other recommended", "recommendation": "Re-excision can be considered [AMP-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Pancreatoduodenectomy", "label": "If re-excision not feasible or for persistent positive margins", "preference": "Other recommended", "recommendation": "Pancreatoduodenectomy is recommended [AMP-2].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Not applicable for adenomas."}}, {"criteria": "Adenocarcinoma found on pathology after resection of adenoma", "options": [{"type": "Treat as ampullary adenocarcinoma", "label": "Proceed to adenocarcinoma pathways", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Follow guidelines for ampullary adenocarcinoma based on stage [AMP-2, MS-5].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant therapy may be indicated based on pathologic staging of adenocarcinoma."}}]}

sections.heading: Localized Ampullary Adenocarcinoma without High-Risk Features
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "localized_early", "title": "Localized Ampullary Adenocarcinoma without High-Risk Features", "branching_basis": ["Resectability", "Performance status", "Histologic subtype"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Localized disease, no metastases, resectable, good performance status", "options": [{"type": "Surgery", "label": "Pancreatoduodenectomy (preferred)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Pancreatoduodenectomy is the standard surgical approach for localized disease [AMP-4, MS-6].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Adjuvant therapy", "label": "Postoperative based on stage", "preference": "Recommended", "recommendation": "Adjuvant systemic therapy is recommended within 12 weeks of surgery. For stage I, adjuvant chemotherapy or observation; for stages II and III, adjuvant chemotherapy ± chemoradiation [AMP-5, MS-9].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Adjuvant therapy is based on final pathologic stage and histologic subtype."}}, {"criteria": "Localized disease, resectable, but with high-risk features (equivocal imaging, elevated markers, large tumors, etc.)", "options": [{"type": "Neoadjuvant therapy", "label": "Consider systemic therapy with or without chemoradiation", "preference": "Other recommended", "recommendation": "Neoadjuvant systemic therapy may be considered, with regimens varying by histologic subtype. Participation in a clinical trial is encouraged [AMP-4, MS-6, MS-9].", "linked_regimen_ids": ["neoadjuvant_pancreatobiliary", "neoadjuvant_intestinal"]}, {"type": "Surgery", "label": "Pancreatoduodenectomy after neoadjuvant therapy if resectable", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Surgery is performed after neoadjuvant therapy and restaging [AMP-4].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Post-surgical adjuvant therapy depends on response to neoadjuvant therapy and final pathology."}}, {"criteria": "Locally advanced, unresectable disease", "options": [{"type": "Systemic therapy", "label": "First-line based on subtype and PS", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Treated similarly to metastatic disease with systemic therapy. Chemoradiation may be considered for local control [AMP-4, MS-12].", "linked_regimen_ids": ["first_line_metastatic"]}, {"type": "Consider tertiary referral", "label": "For second opinion on unresectability", "preference": "Other recommended", "recommendation": "Refer to tertiary cancer center for assessment [AMP-4].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Not applicable; palliative intent."}}]}
